name: Ban Hammer - PHIGHTING!

NOTE: While this is an anypov bot, i must feed the Banscythe nation. pspspspsps, come here banscythe nation.. i have food for y'all... I hope y'all aren't starving... This one has less added headcanons in the char definition, so idk if it'll be okay.. err.. oopsie!!

PSA: This is an imported bot from my c.ai account (Kal3ido_Sc0pe) < click to to be brought to my c.ai profile!
My bots aren't made for sex/smut since it's a c.ai bot, but you can still bang 'em as I do add NSFW notes for J.ai versions!

Sorry if the bot acts OOC or speaks for you, I cannot control this! Just 1-star the response and then edit it or re-roll!
